name: Survival Story
short_description: Survival Story is a zombie-infested world where every step can be the last. Look for food and water, hunt and craft, and find out all the secrets that this world hides. Can you survive in a harsh world where everyone wants to kick your ass?
detailed_description:
Survival Story - a unique immersion into the world of survival, where every step is a struggle for life. In this exciting game, you have to survive in a post-apocalyptic world where zombies and dangers await at every corner. From hunger and thirst to the invasion of the creepy walking dead, you will face continuous challenges that require your ingenuity and endurance.

EXPLORE THE OPEN WORLD


Show your survival skills by exploring a variety of locations and fighting for the resources you need to survive. But be careful: every decision can have consequences, and your life may be at risk at any moment.

COMPLETE TASKS AND GET TO KNOW THE WORLD


Immerse yourself in an atmosphere of continuous tension with fascinating pixel graphics and an exciting atmosphere. The world of the game is filled with mysteries and riddles that you have to solve.

THERE IS SOMETHING FOR EVERYONE TO DO


In the game you can:
  • Kill zombies
  • To die from zombies
  • Looking for something to fill your stomach with
  • To die if you haven't found something to fill your stomach with
  • Accidentally throwing a grenade under yourself and realizing that it was a very bad idea
  • Craft a lot of useful things from useless things that you found while digging in another trash can

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Japanese
